features.name: async reset with combinational-derived reset signal
features.description: Code should include an always block with asynchronous reset where the reset signal is derived from combinational logic rather than being a primary input

features.name: multi-clock domain design with async reset
features.description: Code should include a design with two clock domains (ACLK and HCLK) where one domain has an asynchronous reset that depends on signals from the other domain
